articles.title: Asia stocks slide as US and Iran threaten to intensify war - BBC
articles.description: The International Energy Agency chief said the war could lead to the world's worst energy crisis in decades.
articles.content: "If Iran doesn't FULLY OPEN, WITHOUT THREAT, the Strait of Hormuz, within 48 HOURS from this exact point in time, the United States of America will hit and obliterate their various POWER PLANTS, STAR… [+100 chars]
